Gate Management

Secure Every Entry.
Simplify Every Exit.

SmartGate gives your security and operations teams complete control over Visitors, Materials, Vehicles, and Contractors — at every entry and exit point, from one place.

How It Works
Velantra VMSVisitor Management System

Welcome.

Enter your email to verify your identity and begin the registration process.

Visitor verifiedDigital pass ready
What SmartGate manages

One Platform for Every Gate Movement.

SmartGate brings visitors, materials, vehicles, and contractors under one intelligent control layer — every movement tracked, documented, and secured.

01

Visitors

Digital registration, host approval, and verified entry — every visitor accounted for, every time.

02

Materials

Track every item that enters or leaves your facility — inward delivery or outward dispatch, fully documented.

03

Vehicles

End-to-end vehicle movement control — from entry authorization to exit clearance for every vehicle type.

04

Contractors & Services

Manage service personnel, their equipment, and safe exit — nothing enters or leaves untracked.

Real-time control

Complete Visibility with Intelligent Dashboard.

Monitor every visitor movement from a centralized dashboard. Manage approvals, check-ins, active visitors, departures, and overstays in real time.

Explore Dashboard →

Digital visitor pass

Secure. Smart. Digital.

Every approved visitor gets a secure digital pass containing all essential visit information.

Materials management

Track Every Item.
In or Out.

Complete visibility over every material that moves through your gate — inward deliveries, outward dispatches, and returnable assets, all documented and approved.

Vehicle management

Control Every Vehicle.
Every Movement.

End-to-end vehicle tracking from the moment a vehicle approaches the gate to the moment it exits — with full verification and audit logs at every step.

See It in Action →
Contractor management

Authorize Every Contractor.
Track Every Tool.

Manage service personnel with precision — from work order verification at entry to tool accounting and exit approval. Nothing in, nothing out without a record.
